pr.title: Show responsible filter details on the blocked page
pr.body:
## Summary
- include the matched filter and group details in blocked-page state responses
- render blocking details on the blocked page, including the group's schedule summary
- add unit and Playwright coverage for the new blocked-page details

## Validation
- npm run check
- parallel_validation (CodeQL passed; Code Review tool failed twice due an upstream 400 header error)
pr.author: Copilot
